summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Standalone docs/i18n glossary PR with missing behavior proof. Keep open as an independent inventory item rather than dedupe or close.
Standalone docs PR with blank-template/needs-proof signals. Keep open as independent; no canonical or duplicate target is hydrated.
Broad feature/provider PR with dirty-candidate and missing-proof signals. It is independent inventory work and not safe for close, merge, or fix planning in this job.
Narrow standalone script bug-fix PR that may be useful but still needs behavior proof. Keep independent rather than close or mark fixed by candidate.
Standalone feature PR with broad surface area, linked historical replacement context, and failing proof/check signals. Keep independent for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
